tiers.label: T1
tiers.description: Technical evidence such as satellite imagery, sensor logs, or official datasets.

tiers.label: T2
tiers.description: Operational evidence such as contracts, permits, procurement records.

tiers.label: T3
tiers.description: Eyewitness evidence such as testimony or field reports.

tiers.label: T4
tiers.description: Secondary evidence such as news articles or social media posts.
